name: happy-path-variant-b
task: Configure a new BrowserWindow for a detachable chart viewer panel. It should open as a separate window that displays a specific artifact/chart. Make sure it follows Argus security standards.
assertions: Response includes `contextIsolation: true` in the BrowserWindow webPreferences
Response includes `nodeIntegration: false` in the BrowserWindow webPreferences
Response includes `sandbox: true` in the BrowserWindow webPreferences
Response includes `webviewTag: false` in the BrowserWindow webPreferences
Response uses `app.isPackaged` (not `process.env.NODE_ENV`) to determine whether to load from localhost URL or file path
